chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2894 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Masood Khan, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- Counsel for applicant/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application, the same is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
